name: Sullivan Steele
tagline: Sand-etched glass, wood craft, digital art & 3D models
bio: I'm a maker and data scientist from Charleston, WV. I grew up around restaurants, workshops, and people who figured things out with their hands — that stuck. Homegrown Spirits started with sand-etched glasswork and has grown to include wood crafts, data-art prints, and digital models. Every handmade piece is made by me and my partner in Charleston.
